name: Wanshih Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Wanshih Electronic Co., Ltd. operates as an OEM/ODM manufacturer of mini coaxial cable assembly for tier-one notebook computer and mobile phone companies worldwide. The company primarily provides NB and mini-coaxial cables, LCD TV cables/wire harnesses, mobile phone cables, wire harness cables, electronic components, and smart antennas/modules. Its products include external cables comprising HDMI, USB 2.0/3.0/3.1, SATA, LAN, D-SUB/DVI, RCA, VGA, BNC, automobile, lightning, and medical cables, as well as power cords; antennas, such as external Wi-Fi and LTE, built-in PCB and metal, built-in MIMO, satellite positioning, small base station, and fiberglass tube; and internal cables consisting of LVDS/eDP, consumer device, industrial, medical, and robotic cables. It also provides SMT products and assembly, such as SMT equipment comprising multi-f production, solder paste printing, 3D online solder paste, and AOI optical inspection; and various applications in automobile, consumer electronic, and 3C/AI. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
